query:
You are working on the pinterest/ktlint repository.
The codebase is at version 0.50 (commit: 7d8a509f).

## Issue to Resolve

Missing whitespace before function body is inserted in wrong place in AST
Given code below:
```
class UampNotificationManager(
    private val context: Context,
    sessionToken: MediaSessionCompat.Token,
    notificationListener: PlayerNotificationManager.NotificationListener,
) {
    fun showNotificationForPlayer(player: Player){
        notificationManager.setPlayer(player)
    }
}
```
and `.editorconfig`:
```
root = true

[**/*.{kt,kts}]
ktlint_code_style = ktlint_official
ktlint_experimental = enabled
ktlint_standard = enabled
```
then ktlint `0.50.0` is not able to format the code correctly in 3 runs.

When linting the original code, the following is reported:
```
src/main/kotlin/UampNotificationManager.kt:6:50: Missing spacing before "{" (standard:curly-spacing)
src/main/kotlin/UampNotificationManager.kt:6:50: Expected a single white space before start of function body (standard:function-start-of-body-spacing)
src/main/kotlin/UampNotificationManager.kt:6:50: Expected a single space before body block (standard:function-signature)
12:11:35.739 [main] WARN com.pinterest.ktlint.cli.internal.KtlintCommandLine - Lint has found errors than can be autocorrected using 'ktlint --format'
```
So three different rules are reporting the same error.

When running format, the output is:
```
12:12:49.476 [pool-1-thread-1] WARN com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.api.KtLintRuleEngine - Format was not able to resolve all violations which (theoretically) can be autocorrected in file .../src/main/kotlin/UampNotificationManager.kt in 3 consecutive runs of format.
```
Also, the file is formatted correctly *and* no more errors remain despite that formatting reports that not all problems were solved.

The problem is caused by inserting the whitespace element in the wrong position in the AST. If ktlint is restarted, the file is parsed again and the whitespace is in the expected place in the AST and no more error is to be fixed.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `CHANGELOG.md`
- `ktlint-rule-engine-core/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/rule/engine/core/api/ASTNodeExtension.kt`
- `ktlint-rule-engine/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/rule/engine/api/KtLintRuleEngine.kt`
- `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/FunctionSignatureRule.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

157â†’        node: ASTNode,
158â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
159â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
160â†’    ) {
161â†’        require(node.elementType == FUN)
162â†’
163â†’        val forceMultilineSignature =
164â†’            node.hasMinimumNumberOfParameters() ||
165â†’                node.containsMultilineParameter() ||
166â†’                (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.containsAnnotatedParameter())
167â†’        if (isMaxLineLengthSet()) {
168â†’            val singleLineFunctionSignatureLength = calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(node, emit, autoCorrect)
169â†’            // Function signatures not having parameters, should not be reformatted automatically. It would result in function signatures
170â†’            // like below, which are not acceptable:
171â†’            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
172â†’            //     ) = "some-value"
173â†’            //
174â†’            //     fun aVeryLongFunctionName(
175â†’            //     ): SomeVeryLongTypeName =
176â†’            //         SomeVeryLongTypeName(...)
177â†’            // Leave it up to the max-line-length rule to detect those violations so that the developer can handle it manually.
178â†’            val rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters = node.countParameters() > 0 && singleLineFunctionSignatureLength > maxLineLength
179â†’            if (forceMultilineSignature || rewriteFunctionSignatureWithParameters) {
180â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
181â†’                // Due to rewriting the function signature, the remaining length on the last line of the multiline
182â†’                // signature needs to be recalculated
183â†’                val lengthOfLastLine = recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node)
184â†’                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - lengthOfLastLine)
185â†’            } else {
186â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
187â†’                fixFunctionBody(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLineLength - singleLineFunctionSignatureLength)
188â†’            }
189â†’        } else {
190â†’            // When max line length is not set then keep it as single line function signature only when the original
191â†’            // signature already was a single line signature. Otherwise, rewrite the entire signature as a multiline
192â†’            // signature.
193â†’            val rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature =
194â†’                node
195â†’                    .functionSignatureNodes()
196â†’                    .none { it.textContains('\n') }
197â†’            if (!forceMultilineSignature && rewriteToSingleLineFunctionSignature) {
198â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = false)
199â†’            } else {
200â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = true, dryRun = false)
201â†’            }
202â†’        }
203â†’    }
204â†’
205â†’    private fun recalculateRemainLengthForFirstLineOfBodyExpression(node: ASTNode): Int {
206â†’        val closingParenthesis =
207â†’            node
208â†’                .findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
209â†’                ?.findChildByType(RPAR)
210â†’        val tailNodesOfFunctionSignature =
211â†’            node
212â†’                .functionSignatureNodes()
213â†’                .childrenBetween(
214â†’                    startASTNodePredicate = { it == closingParenthesis },
215â†’                    endASTNodePredicate = { false },
216â†’                )
217â†’
218â†’        return node.indent(false).length +
219â†’            tailNodesOfFunctionSignature.sumOf { it.text.length }
220â†’    }
221â†’
222â†’    private fun ASTNode.containsMultilineParameter(): Boolean =
223â†’        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
224â†’            ?.children()
225â†’            .orEmpty()
226â†’            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
227â†’            .any { it.textContains('\n') }
228â†’
229â†’    private fun ASTNode.containsAnnotatedParameter(): Boolean =
230â†’        findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
231â†’            ?.children()
232â†’            .orEmpty()
233â†’            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
234â†’            .any { it.isAnnotated() }
235â†’
236â†’    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotated() =
237â†’        findChildByType(MODIFIER_LIST)
238â†’            ?.children()
239â†’            .orEmpty()
240â†’            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
241â†’
242â†’    private fun calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(
243â†’        node: ASTNode,
244â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
245â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
246â†’    ): Int {
247â†’        val actualFunctionSignatureLength = node.getFunctionSignatureLength()
248â†’
249â†’        // Calculate the length of the function signature in case it would be rewritten as single line (and without a
250â†’        // maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the actual fix.
251â†’        return actualFunctionSignatureLength +
252â†’            // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
253â†’            fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
254â†’    }
255â†’
256â†’    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureLength() = indent(false).length + getFunctionSignatureNodesLength()
257â†’
258â†’    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionSignatureNodesLength() =
259â†’        functionSignatureNodes()
260â†’            .joinTextToString()
261â†’            .length
262â†’
263â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(
264â†’        node: ASTNode,
265â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
266â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
267â†’        multiline: Boolean,
268â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
269â†’    ): Int {
270â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
271â†’
272â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
273â†’        val firstParameterInList =
274â†’            valueParameterList
275â†’                .children()
276â†’                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
277â†’
278â†’        whiteSpaceCorrection +=
279â†’            if (firstParameterInList == null) {
280â†’                // handle empty parameter list
281â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, dryRun)
282â†’            } else {
283â†’                fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
284â†’                    fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
285â†’                    fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun)
286â†’            }
287â†’
288â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
289â†’    }
290â†’
291â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(
292â†’        node: ASTNode,
293â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
294â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
295â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
296â†’    ): Int {
297â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
298â†’
299â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
300â†’
301â†’        valueParameterList
302â†’            .children()
303â†’            .filter { it.elementType != LPAR && it.elementType != RPAR }
304â†’            .also { elementsInValueParameterList ->
305â†’                // Functions with comments in the value parameter list are excluded from processing before. So an "empty" value
306â†’                // parameter list should only contain a single whitespace element
307â†’                require(elementsInValueParameterList.count() <= 1)
308â†’            }
309â†’            .firstOrNull()
310â†’            ?.let { whiteSpace ->
311â†’                if (!dryRun) {
312â†’                    emit(
313â†’                        whiteSpace.startOffset,
314â†’                        "No whitespace expected in empty parameter list",
315â†’                        true,
316â†’                    )
317â†’                }
318â†’                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
319â†’                    whiteSpace.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpace)
320â†’                } else {
321â†’                    whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpace.textLength
322â†’                }
323â†’            }
324â†’
325â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
326â†’    }
327â†’
328â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(
329â†’        node: ASTNode,
330â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
331â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
332â†’        multiline: Boolean,
333â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
334â†’    ): Int {
335â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
336â†’
337â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
338â†’        val firstParameterInList =
339â†’            valueParameterList
340â†’                .children()
341â†’                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
342â†’
343â†’        val firstParameter = firstParameterInList.firstChildNode
344â†’        firstParameter
345â†’            ?.prevLeaf()
346â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
347â†’            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
348â†’                if (multiline) {
349â†’                    val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
350â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
351â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
352â†’                    ) {
353â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
354â†’                            emit(
355â†’                                firstParameterInList.startOffset,
356â†’                                "Newline expected after opening parenthesis",
357â†’                                true,
358â†’                            )
359â†’                        }
360â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
361â†’                            valueParameterList.firstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedParameterIndent)
362â†’                        } else {
363â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
364â†’                        }
365â†’                    }
366â†’                } else {
367â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier != null) {
368â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
369â†’                            emit(
370â†’                                firstParameter!!.startOffset,
371â†’                                "No whitespace expected between opening parenthesis and first parameter name",
372â†’                                true,
373â†’                            )
374â†’                        }
375â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
376â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier)
377â†’                        } else {
378â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textLength
379â†’                        }
380â†’                    }
381â†’                }
382â†’            }
383â†’
384â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
385â†’    }
386â†’
387â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(
388â†’        node: ASTNode,
389â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
390â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
391â†’        multiline: Boolean,
392â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
393â†’    ): Int {
394â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
395â†’
396â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
397â†’        val firstParameterInList =
398â†’            valueParameterList
399â†’                .children()
400â†’                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
401â†’
402â†’        valueParameterList
403â†’            .children()
404â†’            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
405â†’            .filter { it != firstParameterInList }
406â†’            .forEach { valueParameter ->
407â†’                val firstChildNodeInValueParameter = valueParameter.firstChildNode
408â†’                firstChildNodeInValueParameter
409â†’                    ?.prevLeaf()
410â†’                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
411â†’                    .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
412â†’                        if (multiline) {
413â†’                            val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
414â†’                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
415â†’                                whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
416â†’                            ) {
417â†’                                if (!dryRun) {
418â†’                                    emit(
419â†’                                        valueParameter.startOffset,
420â†’                                        "Parameter should start on a newline",
421â†’                                        true,
422â†’                                    )
423â†’                                }
424â†’                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
425â†’                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
426â†’                                } else {
427â†’                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
428â†’                                }
429â†’                            }
430â†’                        } else {
431â†’                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null || whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != " ") {
432â†’                                if (!dryRun) {
433â†’                                    emit(
434â†’                                        firstChildNodeInValueParameter!!.startOffset,
435â†’                                        "Single whitespace expected before parameter",
436â†’                                        true,
437â†’                                    )
438â†’                                }
439â†’                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
440â†’                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
441â†’                                } else {
442â†’                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += 1 - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
443â†’                                }
444â†’                            }
445â†’                        }
446â†’                    }
447â†’            }
448â†’
449â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
450â†’    }

452â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(
453â†’        node: ASTNode,
454â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
455â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
456â†’        multiline: Boolean,
457â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
458â†’    ): Int {
459â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
460â†’
461â†’        val newlineAndIndent = node.indent()
462â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
463â†’
464â†’        val closingParenthesis = valueParameterList.findChildByType(RPAR)
465â†’        closingParenthesis
466â†’            ?.prevSibling()
467â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
468â†’            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis ->
469â†’                if (multiline) {
470â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis == null ||
471â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.text != newlineAndIndent
472â†’                    ) {
473â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
474â†’                            emit(
475â†’                                closingParenthesis!!.startOffset,
476â†’                                "Newline expected before closing parenthesis",
477â†’                                true,
478â†’                            )
479â†’                        }
480â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
481â†’                            closingParenthesis!!.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(newlineAndIndent)
482â†’                        } else {
483â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection += newlineAndIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis?.textLength ?: 0)
484â†’                        }
485â†’                    }
486â†’                } else {
487â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis != null &&
488â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.nextLeaf()?.elementType == RPAR
489â†’                    ) {
490â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
491â†’                            emit(
492â†’                                whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.startOffset,
493â†’                                "No whitespace expected between last parameter and closing parenthesis",
494â†’                                true,
495â†’                            )
496â†’                        }
497â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
498â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis)
499â†’                        } else {
500â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textLength
501â†’                        }
502â†’                    }
503â†’                }
504â†’            }
505â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
506â†’    }

508â†’    private fun fixFunctionBody(
509â†’        node: ASTNode,
510â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
511â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
512â†’        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
513â†’    ) {
514â†’        if (node.findChildByType(EQ) == null) {
515â†’            fixFunctionBodyBlock(node, emit, autoCorrect)
516â†’        } else {
517â†’            fixFunctionBodyExpression(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression)
518â†’        }
519â†’    }
520â†’
521â†’    private fun fixFunctionBodyExpression(
522â†’        node: ASTNode,
523â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
524â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
525â†’        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
526â†’    ) {
527â†’        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression =
528â†’            node
529â†’                .findChildByType(EQ)
530â†’                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
531â†’                ?: return
532â†’        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression)
533â†’        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
534â†’        val functionBodyExpressionNodes = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
535â†’
536â†’        val functionBodyExpressionLines =
537â†’            functionBodyExpressionNodes
538â†’                .joinTextToString()
539â†’                .split("\n")
540â†’        functionBodyExpressionLines
541â†’            .firstOrNull()
542â†’            ?.also { firstLineOfBodyExpression ->
543â†’                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
544â†’                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression
545â†’                        .nextCodeSibling()
546â†’                        .takeIf { it?.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION }
547â†’                        ?.let {
548â†’                            // Never merge an annotated expression body with function signature as this conflicts with the Annotation rule
549â†’                            return
550â†’                        }
551â†’                    val mergeWithFunctionSignature =
552â†’                        if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length < maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression) {
553â†’                            functionBodyExpressionWrapping == default ||
554â†’                                (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size == 1) ||
555â†’                                node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(
556â†’                                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression,
557â†’                                )
558â†’                        } else {
559â†’                            false
560â†’                        }
561â†’                    if (mergeWithFunctionSignature) {
562â†’                        emit(
563â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression!!.startOffset,
564â†’                            "First line of body expression fits on same line as function signature",
565â†’                            true,
566â†’                        )
567â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
568â†’                            (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
569â†’                        }
570â†’                    }
571â†’                } else if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
572â†’                    !whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.textContains('\n')
573â†’                ) {
574â†’                    if (node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression) &&
575â†’                        firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 <= maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression
576â†’                    ) {
577â†’                        if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
578â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.text != " "
579â†’                        ) {
580â†’                            emit(
581â†’                                functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
582â†’                                "Single whitespace expected before expression body",
583â†’                                true,
584â†’                            )
585â†’                            if (autoCorrect) {
586â†’                                functionBodyExpressionNodes
587â†’                                    .first()
588â†’                                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
589â†’                            }
590â†’                        }
591â†’                    } else if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 > maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression ||
592â†’                        (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size > 1) ||
593â†’                        functionBodyExpressionWrapping == always
594â†’                    ) {
595â†’                        emit(
596â†’                            functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
597â†’                            "Newline expected before expression body",
598â†’                            true,
599â†’                        )
600â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
601â†’                            functionBodyExpressionNodes
602â†’                                .first()
603â†’                                .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node))
604â†’                        }
605â†’                    }
606â†’                }
607â†’            }
608â†’    }

610â†’    private fun ASTNode.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression: ASTNode?) =
611â†’        functionSignatureNodes()
612â†’            .childrenBetween(
613â†’                startASTNodePredicate = { true },
614â†’                endASTNodePredicate = { it == lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression },
615â†’            ).joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
616â†’            .split("\n")
617â†’            .lastOrNull()
618â†’            ?.matches(INDENT_WITH_CLOSING_PARENTHESIS)
619â†’            ?: false

621â†’    private fun fixFunctionBodyBlock(
622â†’        node: ASTNode,
623â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
624â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
625â†’    ) {
626â†’        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody =
627â†’            node
628â†’                .getLastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody()
629â†’                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
630â†’                ?: return
631â†’
632â†’        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody)
633â†’        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
634â†’        val functionBodyBlock = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
635â†’
636â†’        functionBodyBlock
637â†’            .joinTextToString()
638â†’            .split("\n")
639â†’            .firstOrNull()
640â†’            ?.also {
641â†’                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression?.text != " ") {
642â†’                    emit(functionBodyBlock.first().startOffset, "Expected a single space before body block", true)
643â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
644â†’                        functionBodyBlock
645â†’                            .first()
646â†’                            .prevLeaf(true)
647â†’                            ?.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
648â†’                    }
649â†’                }
650â†’            }
651â†’    }

653â†’    private fun ASTNode.getFunctionBody(splitNode: ASTNode?): List<ASTNode> =
654â†’        this
655â†’            .collectLeavesRecursively()
656â†’            .childrenBetween(
657â†’                startASTNodePredicate = { it == splitNode },
658â†’                endASTNodePredicate = {
659â†’                    // collect all remaining nodes
660â†’                    false
661â†’                },
662â†’            )
663â†’
664â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull() =
665â†’        this
666â†’            .firstOrNull()
667â†’            ?.takeIf { first -> first.isWhiteSpace() }

669â†’    private fun isMaxLineLengthSet() = maxLineLength != MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY_OFF

671â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.collectLeavesRecursively(): List<ASTNode> = flatMap { it.collectLeavesRecursively() }
672â†’
673â†’    private fun ASTNode.collectLeavesRecursively(): List<ASTNode> =
674â†’        if (psi is LeafElement) {
675â†’            listOf(this)
676â†’        } else {
677â†’            children()
678â†’                .flatMap { it.collectLeavesRecursively() }
679â†’                .toList()
680â†’        }

682â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.childrenBetween(
683â†’        startASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> true },
684â†’        endASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> false },
685â†’    ): List<ASTNode> {
686â†’        val iterator = iterator()
687â†’        var currentNode: ASTNode
688â†’        val childrenBetween: MutableList<ASTNode> = mutableListOf()
689â†’
690â†’        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
691â†’            currentNode = iterator.next()
692â†’            if (startASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
693â†’                childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
694â†’                break
695â†’            }
696â†’        }
697â†’
698â†’        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
699â†’            currentNode = iterator.next()
700â†’            childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
701â†’            if (endASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
702â†’                break
703â†’            }
704â†’        }
705â†’
706â†’        return childrenBetween
707â†’    }

709â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.joinTextToString(block: (ASTNode) -> String = { it.text }): String =

 16â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RBRACKET
 17â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.RPAR
 18â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.SAFE_ACCESS
 19â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.ElementType.SEMICOLON

 24â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.prevLeaf
 25â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe
 26â†’import com.pinterest.ktlint.rule.engine.core.api.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe

 28â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 29â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiComment
 30â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 31â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 32â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.TreeElement
 33â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.lexer.KtTokens
 34â†’import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtLambdaExpression
 35â†’
 36â†’public class SpacingAroundCurlyRule : StandardRule("curly-spacing") {
 37â†’    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 38â†’        node: ASTNode,
 39â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 40â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 41â†’    ) {
 42â†’        if (node.isLeaf() && !node.isPartOfString()) {
 43â†’            val prevLeaf = node.prevLeaf()
 44â†’            val nextLeaf = node.nextLeaf()
 45â†’            val spacingBefore: Boolean
 46â†’            val spacingAfter: Boolean
 47â†’            if (node.elementType == LBRACE) {
 48â†’                spacingBefore =
 49â†’                    prevLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace ||
 50â†’                    prevLeaf?.elementType == AT ||
 51â†’                    (
 52â†’                        prevLeaf?.elementType == LPAR &&
 53â†’                            ((node as LeafPsiElement).parent is KtLambdaExpression || node.parent.parent is KtLambdaExpression)
 54â†’                        )
 55â†’                spacingAfter = nextLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace || nextLeaf?.elementType == RBRACE
 56â†’                if (prevLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace &&
 57â†’                    !prevLeaf.textContains('\n') &&
 58â†’                    prevLeaf.prevLeaf()?.let {
 59â†’                        it.elementType == LPAR || it.elementType == AT
 60â†’                    } == true
 61â†’                ) {
 62â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected space before \"${node.text}\"", true)
 63â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
 64â†’                        prevLeaf.node.treeParent.removeChild(prevLeaf.node)
 65â†’                    }
 66â†’                }
 67â†’                if (prevLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace && prevLeaf.textContains('\n') &&
 68â†’                    (
 69â†’                        prevLeaf.prevLeaf()?.let { it.elementType == RPAR || KtTokens.KEYWORDS.contains(it.elementType) } == true ||
 70â†’                            node.treeParent.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 71â†’                            (prevLeaf.treeParent.elementType == FUN && prevLeaf.treeNext.elementType != LAMBDA_EXPRESSION)
 72â†’                        ) // allow newline for lambda return type
 73â†’                ) {
 74â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected newline before \"${node.text}\"", true)
 75â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
 76â†’                        val eolCommentExists =
 77â†’                            prevLeaf
 78â†’                                .prevLeaf()
 79â†’                                ?.let { it is PsiComment && it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
 80â†’                                ?: false
 81â†’                        if (eolCommentExists) {
 82â†’                            val commentLeaf = prevLeaf.prevLeaf()!!
 83â†’                            if (commentLeaf.prevLeaf() is PsiWhiteSpace) {
 84â†’                                (commentLeaf.prevLeaf() as LeafPsiElement).rawRemove()
 85â†’                            }
 86â†’                            (node.treeParent.treeParent as TreeElement).removeChild(commentLeaf)
 87â†’                            (node.treeParent as TreeElement).addChild(commentLeaf, node.treeNext)
 88â†’                            node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
 89â†’                        }
 90â†’                        (prevLeaf as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
 91â†’                    }
 92â†’                }
 93â†’            } else if (node.elementType == RBRACE) {
 94â†’                spacingBefore = prevLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace || prevLeaf?.elementType == LBRACE
 95â†’                spacingAfter = nextLeaf == null || nextLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace || shouldNotToBeSeparatedBySpace(nextLeaf)
 96â†’                if (nextLeaf is PsiWhiteSpace && !nextLeaf.textContains('\n') &&
 97â†’                    shouldNotToBeSeparatedBySpace(nextLeaf.nextLeaf())
 98â†’                ) {
 99â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected space after \"${node.text}\"", true)
100â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
101â†’                        nextLeaf.node.treeParent.removeChild(nextLeaf.node)
102â†’                    }
103â†’                }
104â†’            } else {
105â†’                return
106â†’            }
107â†’            when {
108â†’                !spacingBefore && !spacingAfter -> {
109â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Missing spacing around \"${node.text}\"", true)
110â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
111â†’                        node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
112â†’                        node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
113â†’                    }
114â†’                }
115â†’                !spacingBefore -> {
116â†’                    emit(node.startOffset, "Missing spacing before \"${node.text}\"", true)
117â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
118â†’                        node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
119â†’                    }
120â†’                }
121â†’                !spacingAfter -> {
122â†’                    emit(node.startOffset + 1, "Missing spacing after \"${node.text}\"", true)
123â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
124â†’                        node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
125â†’                    }
126â†’                }
127â†’            }
128â†’        }
129â†’    }
130â†’
131â†’    private fun shouldNotToBeSeparatedBySpace(leaf: ASTNode?): Boolean {
132â†’        val nextElementType = leaf?.elementType
133â†’        return (
134â†’            nextElementType == DOT ||
135â†’                nextElementType == COMMA ||
136â†’                nextElementType == RBRACKET ||
137â†’                nextElementType == RPAR ||
138â†’                nextElementType == SEMICOLON ||
139â†’                nextElementType == SAFE_ACCESS ||
140â†’                nextElementType == EXCLEXCL ||
141â†’                nextElementType == LBRACKET ||
142â†’                nextElementType == LPAR ||
143â†’                nextElementType == COLONCOLON
144â†’            )
145â†’    }
146â†’}
147â†’

content.text:
Now I understand the issue. Let me analyze the root cause:

1. In `fixFunctionBodyBlock`, when inserting whitespace before the function body block, the code uses:
   ```kotlin
   functionBodyBlock
       .first()
       .prevLeaf(true)
       ?.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
   ```

2. The problem is in `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe` in `ASTNodeExtension.kt`. When `treeNext` is null, it falls back to `nextLeaf()` which can traverse up the tree and find whitespace nodes that are not direct siblings.

3. Similarly, `upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe` has an issue: when `treePrev` is null on a leaf node, it falls back to `prevLeaf()` which can find nodes like RPAR (closing parenthesis) that are not direct siblings of the current node.

4. When multiple rules try to fix the same issue, the whitespace gets inserted at the wrong position because the AST is in an intermediate state.

Let me look more closely at the AST structure and verify my understanding:

conversation_history.name: read

content.text:
Now I understand the issue. The problem is in the `upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe` and `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe` functions in `ASTNodeExtension.kt`. When `treePrev` or `treeNext` is null, they fall back to `prevLeaf()` or `nextLeaf()` which can traverse up the tree and find nodes that are not direct siblings. This causes the whitespace to be inserted at the wrong position in the AST.

Let me create a test to reproduce the issue first:

content.text:
I've reproduced the issue. The file is formatted correctly, but ktlint reports that it was not able to resolve all violations in 3 consecutive runs of format. This is because the whitespace is being inserted at the wrong position in the AST during the formatting process.

Now let me analyze the root cause and fix it. The issue is in the `upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe` and `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe` functions. When `treePrev` or `treeNext` is null, they fall back to `prevLeaf()` or `nextLeaf()` which can traverse up the tree and find nodes that are not direct siblings.

conversation_history.name: read

content.text:
Now I understand the root cause. The issue is in `upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe` and `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe`. When `treePrev` or `treeNext` is null, the functions fall back to `prevLeaf()` or `nextLeaf()` which can traverse up the tree and find nodes that are not direct siblings. This causes the whitespace to be inserted at the wrong position.

The fix is to not fall back to `prevLeaf()` or `nextLeaf()` when `treePrev` or `treeNext` is null. Instead, we should insert the whitespace directly before/after the current node.

content.text:
Let me analyze the issue more carefully. The problem is that when `treeNext` is null, `upsertWhitespaceAfterMe` falls back to `nextLeaf()` which traverses up the tree and can find whitespace nodes that are not direct siblings. This causes the whitespace to be inserted at the wrong position.

Let me look at how `rawInsertAfterMe` works:

content.text: Let me think about this more carefully. The issue is that when `treeNext` is null, `nextLeaf()` finds a whitespace node that is not a direct sibling. The fix should be to only check direct siblings:

conversation_history.name: read

content.text:
Now I understand the issue. The problem is that when `treeNext` is null and we fall back to `nextLeaf()`, we might find a whitespace node that is not a direct sibling. When we call `replaceWhitespaceWith(text)` on that node, we're modifying a whitespace that might be in a completely different part of the AST.

The fix is to only check direct siblings (`treeNext`) and not fall back to `nextLeaf()`. If `treeNext` is not a whitespace, we should insert new whitespace after the current node.

218â†’        return node.indent(false).length +
219â†’            tailNodesOfFunctionSignature.sumOf { it.text.length }

242â†’    private fun calculateFunctionSignatureLengthAsSingleLineSignature(
243â†’        node: ASTNode,
244â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
245â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
246â†’    ): Int {
247â†’        val actualFunctionSignatureLength = node.getFunctionSignatureLength()
248â†’
249â†’        // Calculate the length of the function signature in case it would be rewritten as single line (and without a
250â†’        // maximum line length). The white space correction will be calculated via a dry run of the actual fix.
251â†’        return actualFunctionSignatureLength +
252â†’            // Calculate the white space correction in case the signature would be rewritten to a single line
253â†’            fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline = false, dryRun = true)
254â†’    }

263â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInValueParameterList(
264â†’        node: ASTNode,
265â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
266â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
267â†’        multiline: Boolean,
268â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
269â†’    ): Int {
270â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
271â†’
272â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
273â†’        val firstParameterInList =
274â†’            valueParameterList
275â†’                .children()
276â†’                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
277â†’
278â†’        whiteSpaceCorrection +=
279â†’            if (firstParameterInList == null) {
280â†’                // handle empty parameter list
281â†’                fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, dryRun)
282â†’            } else {
283â†’                fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
284â†’                    fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun) +
285â†’                    fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(node, emit, autoCorrect, multiline, dryRun)
286â†’            }
287â†’
288â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
289â†’    }
290â†’
291â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesInEmptyValueParameterList(
292â†’        node: ASTNode,
293â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
294â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
295â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
296â†’    ): Int {
297â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
298â†’
299â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
300â†’
301â†’        valueParameterList
302â†’            .children()
303â†’            .filter { it.elementType != LPAR && it.elementType != RPAR }
304â†’            .also { elementsInValueParameterList ->
305â†’                // Functions with comments in the value parameter list are excluded from processing before. So an "empty" value
306â†’                // parameter list should only contain a single whitespace element
307â†’                require(elementsInValueParameterList.count() <= 1)
308â†’            }
309â†’            .firstOrNull()
310â†’            ?.let { whiteSpace ->
311â†’                if (!dryRun) {
312â†’                    emit(
313â†’                        whiteSpace.startOffset,
314â†’                        "No whitespace expected in empty parameter list",
315â†’                        true,
316â†’                    )
317â†’                }
318â†’                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
319â†’                    whiteSpace.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpace)
320â†’                } else {
321â†’                    whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpace.textLength
322â†’                }
323â†’            }
324â†’
325â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
326â†’    }
327â†’
328â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBeforeFirstParameterInValueParameterList(
329â†’        node: ASTNode,
330â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
331â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
332â†’        multiline: Boolean,
333â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
334â†’    ): Int {
335â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
336â†’
337â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
338â†’        val firstParameterInList =
339â†’            valueParameterList
340â†’                .children()
341â†’                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
342â†’
343â†’        val firstParameter = firstParameterInList.firstChildNode
344â†’        firstParameter
345â†’            ?.prevLeaf()
346â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
347â†’            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
348â†’                if (multiline) {
349â†’                    val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
350â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
351â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
352â†’                    ) {
353â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
354â†’                            emit(
355â†’                                firstParameterInList.startOffset,
356â†’                                "Newline expected after opening parenthesis",
357â†’                                true,
358â†’                            )
359â†’                        }
360â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
361â†’                            valueParameterList.firstChildNode.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(expectedParameterIndent)
362â†’                        } else {
363â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
364â†’                        }
365â†’                    }
366â†’                } else {
367â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier != null) {
368â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
369â†’                            emit(
370â†’                                firstParameter!!.startOffset,
371â†’                                "No whitespace expected between opening parenthesis and first parameter name",
372â†’                                true,
373â†’                            )
374â†’                        }
375â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
376â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier)
377â†’                        } else {
378â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.textLength
379â†’                        }
380â†’                    }
381â†’                }
382â†’            }
383â†’
384â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
385â†’    }

387â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpacesBetweenParametersInValueParameterList(
388â†’        node: ASTNode,
389â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
390â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
391â†’        multiline: Boolean,
392â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
393â†’    ): Int {
394â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
395â†’
396â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
397â†’        val firstParameterInList =
398â†’            valueParameterList
399â†’                .children()
400â†’                .first { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
401â†’
402â†’        valueParameterList
403â†’            .children()
404â†’            .filter { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
405â†’            .filter { it != firstParameterInList }
406â†’            .forEach { valueParameter ->
407â†’                val firstChildNodeInValueParameter = valueParameter.firstChildNode
408â†’                firstChildNodeInValueParameter
409â†’                    ?.prevLeaf()
410â†’                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
411â†’                    .let { whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier ->
412â†’                        if (multiline) {
413â†’                            val expectedParameterIndent = indentConfig.childIndentOf(node)
414â†’                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null ||
415â†’                                whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != expectedParameterIndent
416â†’                            ) {
417â†’                                if (!dryRun) {
418â†’                                    emit(
419â†’                                        valueParameter.startOffset,
420â†’                                        "Parameter should start on a newline",
421â†’                                        true,
422â†’                                    )
423â†’                                }
424â†’                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
425â†’                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(expectedParameterIndent)
426â†’                                } else {
427â†’                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += expectedParameterIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
428â†’                                }
429â†’                            }
430â†’                        } else {
431â†’                            if (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier == null || whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier.text != " ") {
432â†’                                if (!dryRun) {
433â†’                                    emit(
434â†’                                        firstChildNodeInValueParameter!!.startOffset,
435â†’                                        "Single whitespace expected before parameter",
436â†’                                        true,
437â†’                                    )
438â†’                                }
439â†’                                if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
440â†’                                    firstChildNodeInValueParameter.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
441â†’                                } else {
442â†’                                    whiteSpaceCorrection += 1 - (whiteSpaceBeforeIdentifier?.textLength ?: 0)
443â†’                                }
444â†’                            }
445â†’                        }
446â†’                    }
447â†’            }
448â†’
449â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
450â†’    }

452â†’    private fun fixWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis(
453â†’        node: ASTNode,
454â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
455â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
456â†’        multiline: Boolean,
457â†’        dryRun: Boolean,
458â†’    ): Int {
459â†’        var whiteSpaceCorrection = 0
460â†’
461â†’        val newlineAndIndent = node.indent()
462â†’        val valueParameterList = requireNotNull(node.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST))
463â†’
464â†’        val closingParenthesis = valueParameterList.findChildByType(RPAR)
465â†’        closingParenthesis
466â†’            ?.prevSibling()
467â†’            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE }
468â†’            .let { whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis ->
469â†’                if (multiline) {
470â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis == null ||
471â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.text != newlineAndIndent
472â†’                    ) {
473â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
474â†’                            emit(
475â†’                                closingParenthesis!!.startOffset,
476â†’                                "Newline expected before closing parenthesis",
477â†’                                true,
478â†’                            )
479â†’                        }
480â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
481â†’                            closingParenthesis!!.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(newlineAndIndent)
482â†’                        } else {
483â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection += newlineAndIndent.length - (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis?.textLength ?: 0)
484â†’                        }
485â†’                    }
486â†’                } else {
487â†’                    if (whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis != null &&
488â†’                        whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.nextLeaf()?.elementType == RPAR
489â†’                    ) {
490â†’                        if (!dryRun) {
491â†’                            emit(
492â†’                                whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.startOffset,
493â†’                                "No whitespace expected between last parameter and closing parenthesis",
494â†’                                true,
495â†’                            )
496â†’                        }
497â†’                        if (autoCorrect && !dryRun) {
498â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.treeParent.removeChild(whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis)
499â†’                        } else {
500â†’                            whiteSpaceCorrection -= whiteSpaceBeforeClosingParenthesis.textLength
501â†’                        }
502â†’                    }
503â†’                }
504â†’            }
505â†’        return whiteSpaceCorrection
506â†’    }

508â†’    private fun fixFunctionBody(
509â†’        node: ASTNode,
510â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
511â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
512â†’        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
513â†’    ) {
514â†’        if (node.findChildByType(EQ) == null) {
515â†’            fixFunctionBodyBlock(node, emit, autoCorrect)
516â†’        } else {
517â†’            fixFunctionBodyExpression(node, emit, autoCorrect, maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression)
518â†’        }
519â†’    }

521â†’    private fun fixFunctionBodyExpression(
522â†’        node: ASTNode,
523â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
524â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
525â†’        maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression: Int,
526â†’    ) {
527â†’        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression =
528â†’            node
529â†’                .findChildByType(EQ)
530â†’                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
531â†’                ?: return
532â†’        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression)
533â†’        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
534â†’        val functionBodyExpressionNodes = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
535â†’
536â†’        val functionBodyExpressionLines =
537â†’            functionBodyExpressionNodes
538â†’                .joinTextToString()
539â†’                .split("\n")
540â†’        functionBodyExpressionLines
541â†’            .firstOrNull()
542â†’            ?.also { firstLineOfBodyExpression ->
543â†’                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
544â†’                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression
545â†’                        .nextCodeSibling()
546â†’                        .takeIf { it?.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION }
547â†’                        ?.let {
548â†’                            // Never merge an annotated expression body with function signature as this conflicts with the Annotation rule
549â†’                            return
550â†’                        }
551â†’                    val mergeWithFunctionSignature =
552â†’                        if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length < maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression) {
553â†’                            functionBodyExpressionWrapping == default ||
554â†’                                (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size == 1) ||
555â†’                                node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(
556â†’                                    lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression,
557â†’                                )
558â†’                        } else {
559â†’                            false
560â†’                        }
561â†’                    if (mergeWithFunctionSignature) {
562â†’                        emit(
563â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression!!.startOffset,
564â†’                            "First line of body expression fits on same line as function signature",
565â†’                            true,
566â†’                        )
567â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
568â†’                            (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
569â†’                        }
570â†’                    }
571â†’                } else if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
572â†’                    !whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.textContains('\n')
573â†’                ) {
574â†’                    if (node.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression) &&
575â†’                        firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 <= maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression
576â†’                    ) {
577â†’                        if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression == null ||
578â†’                            whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression.text != " "
579â†’                        ) {
580â†’                            emit(
581â†’                                functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
582â†’                                "Single whitespace expected before expression body",
583â†’                                true,
584â†’                            )
585â†’                            if (autoCorrect) {
586â†’                                functionBodyExpressionNodes
587â†’                                    .first()
588â†’                                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
589â†’                            }
590â†’                        }
591â†’                    } else if (firstLineOfBodyExpression.length + 1 > maxLengthRemainingForFirstLineOfBodyExpression ||
592â†’                        (functionBodyExpressionWrapping == multiline && functionBodyExpressionLines.size > 1) ||
593â†’                        functionBodyExpressionWrapping == always
594â†’                    ) {
595â†’                        emit(
596â†’                            functionBodyExpressionNodes.first().startOffset,
597â†’                            "Newline expected before expression body",
598â†’                            true,
599â†’                        )
600â†’                        if (autoCorrect) {
601â†’                            functionBodyExpressionNodes
602â†’                                .first()
603â†’                                .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.childIndentOf(node))
604â†’                        }
605â†’                    }
606â†’                }
607â†’            }
608â†’    }

610â†’    private fun ASTNode.isMultilineFunctionSignatureWithoutExplicitReturnType(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression: ASTNode?) =
611â†’        functionSignatureNodes()
612â†’            .childrenBetween(
613â†’                startASTNodePredicate = { true },
614â†’                endASTNodePredicate = { it == lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBodyExpression },
615â†’            ).joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
616â†’            .split("\n")
617â†’            .lastOrNull()
618â†’            ?.matches(INDENT_WITH_CLOSING_PARENTHESIS)
619â†’            ?: false

621â†’    private fun fixFunctionBodyBlock(
622â†’        node: ASTNode,
623â†’        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
624â†’        autoCorrect: Boolean,
625â†’    ) {
626â†’        val lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody =
627â†’            node
628â†’                .getLastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody()
629â†’                ?.nextLeaf(includeEmpty = true)
630â†’                ?: return
631â†’
632â†’        val bodyNodes = node.getFunctionBody(lastNodeOfFunctionSignatureWithBlockBody)
633â†’        val whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression = bodyNodes.getStartingWhitespaceOrNull()
634â†’        val functionBodyBlock = bodyNodes.dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
635â†’
636â†’        functionBodyBlock
637â†’            .joinTextToString()
638â†’            .split("\n")
639â†’            .firstOrNull()
640â†’            ?.also {
641â†’                if (whiteSpaceBeforeFunctionBodyExpression?.text != " ") {
642â†’                    emit(functionBodyBlock.first().startOffset, "Expected a single space before body block", true)
643â†’                    if (autoCorrect) {
644â†’                        functionBodyBlock
645â†’                            .first()
646â†’                            .prevLeaf(true)
647â†’                            ?.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(" ")
648â†’                    }
649â†’                }
650â†’            }
651â†’    }

678â†’                .flatMap { it.collectLeavesRecursively() }

682â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.childrenBetween(
683â†’        startASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> true },
684â†’        endASTNodePredicate: (ASTNode) -> Boolean = { _ -> false },
685â†’    ): List<ASTNode> {
686â†’        val iterator = iterator()
687â†’        var currentNode: ASTNode
688â†’        val childrenBetween: MutableList<ASTNode> = mutableListOf()
689â†’
690â†’        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
691â†’            currentNode = iterator.next()
692â†’            if (startASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
693â†’                childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
694â†’                break
695â†’            }
696â†’        }
697â†’
698â†’        while (iterator.hasNext()) {
699â†’            currentNode = iterator.next()
700â†’            childrenBetween.add(currentNode)
701â†’            if (endASTNodePredicate(currentNode)) {
702â†’                break
703â†’            }
704â†’        }
705â†’
706â†’        return childrenBetween
707â†’    }

709â†’    private fun List<ASTNode>.joinTextToString(block: (ASTNode) -> String = { it.text }): String =

731â†’                type =
732â†’                    PropertyType.LowerCasingPropertyType(
733â†’                        "ktlint_function_signature_rule_force_multiline_when_parameter_count_greater_or_equal_than",
734â†’                        "Force wrapping the parameters of the function signature in case it contains at least the specified " +
735â†’                            "number of parameters even in case the entire function signature would fit on a single line. " +
736â†’                            "By default this parameter is not enabled.",
737â†’                        PropertyType.PropertyValueParser.POSITIVE_INT_VALUE_PARSER,
738â†’                        setOf("1", "2", "3", "4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "unset"),
739â†’                    ),
740â†’                defaultValue = FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET,
741â†’                ktlintOfficialCodeStyleDefaultValue = 2,
742â†’                propertyMapper = { property, _ ->
743â†’                    if (property?.isUnset == true) {
744â†’                        FORCE_MULTILINE_WHEN_PARAMETER_COUNT_GREATER_OR_EQUAL_THAN_PROPERTY_UNSET
745â†’                    } else {
746â†’                        property?.getValueAs<Int>()
747â†’                    }
748â†’                },

758â†’        public val FUNCTION_BODY_EXPRESSION_WRAPPING_PROPERTY: EditorConfigProperty<FunctionBodyExpressionWrapping> =
